segments.title: Recap and Feature Flag for Radix `useId` Wrapper
segments.summary: Justin provides a recap, confirming that the Radix `useId` wrapper is implemented, notes are written, and the isolation/stream stitch approach is documented. Peter requests placing the fix behind a feature flag named `deterministicUseId` for opt-out capability, which Justin confirms is already done and enabled by default.
decisions: The Radix `useId` wrapper will be controlled by a feature flag named `deterministicUseId`, which is on by default.
segments.retrieval_summary: Implement `useId` wrapper for radix behind `deterministicUseId` feature flag, enabled by default, to fix hydration issue.

segments.title: AI Sidebar Duplicate Prompts Bug
segments.summary: Peter reports a bug in Machinen's AI sidebar where hitting enter twice queues duplicate prompts. Justin identifies the cause as a debounce in the input handler firing on both keyup and submit. He suggests consolidating to a single dispatch. Peter also proposes logging a prompt UUID at the edge for deduplication, leading to a plan for both a client-side guard and a server-side idempotency check.
actions: Justin: Consolidate the input handler to a single dispatch to prevent duplicate prompts.
Peter: Log prompt UUID at the edge for deduplication.
Justin: Implement a short-term client-side guard and a server-side idempotency check.
segments.retrieval_summary: Fix machinen AI sidebar duplicate prompts bug with client-side guard and server-side idempotency check using a prompt UUID.

segments.title: Future Plans for Hydration Fix and React 19
segments.summary: Peter asks for any other important information regarding the hydration fix. Justin mentions that React 19 will provide a cleaner solution, and the temporary wrapper will be removed after the upgrade. He plans to open a tracking issue for this.
actions: Justin: Open a tracking issue for removing the `useId` wrapper after upgrading to React 19.
decisions: The `useId` wrapper is a temporary solution until the React 19 upgrade.
segments.retrieval_summary: Plan to remove temporary `useId` wrapper after react_19 upgrade; Justin to open a tracking issue for technical debt.
